name: visual-qa-loop
description: Run a repeatable before/after visual QA loop for local web/app UI changes, using stable screenshots, artifact folders, and concise visual findings.

interface.shortDescription: Run a repeatable before/after visual QA loop for local web/app UI changes, using stable screenshots, artifact folders, and concise visual findings.
interface.longDescription: Run a repeatable before/after visual QA loop for local web/app UI changes, using stable screenshots, artifact folders, and concise visual findings. Works best on a local machine with user-specific files and tools available.
defaultPrompt: Run visual QA for this UI change. Capture before/after screenshots with stable viewport(s), compare them, fix obvious regressions, and save artifacts under agent-notes.
